panels.description: Displays the current number of nodes
panels.title: Nodes count

panels.description: Displays the uptime of each node since its startup. Helps track restarts and identify unstable nodes.
panels.title: Nodes Uptime

panels.description: Displays the current number of VDisks
panels.title: VDisks count

panels.description: Shows CPU usage by thread pool of dynamic nodes. More on CPU pools: https://ydb.tech/docs/en/devops/configuration-management/configuration-v2/config-settings#tuneconfig
panels.title: CPU by thread pool (dynnodes)

panels.description: Displays the percentage of allocated CPU resources used by dynamic nodes broken down by pools. Helps identify CPU resource shortages. More on CPU pools: https://ydb.tech/docs/en/devops/configuration-management/configuration-v2/config-settings#tuneconfig

targets.expr:
label_replace(
  (
    sum(rate(ydb_resources_cpu_used_core_percents{database="$database"}[$__rate_interval])) 
    / 
    sum(ydb_resources_cpu_total_core_percents{database="$database"})
  )
  and on()
  (
    sum(ydb_resources_cpu_limit_core_percents{database="$database"}) 
    > 
    sum(ydb_resources_cpu_total_core_percents{database="$database"})
  ),
  "pool", "CPU utilization", "", ""
)

or

(
  (sum by (pool) (rate(ydb_resources_cpu_used_core_percents{database="$database", container="ydb-dynamic"}[$__rate_interval]))) 
  / 
  (sum by (pool) (ydb_resources_cpu_limit_core_percents{database="$database", container="ydb-dynamic"}))
)
* on() group_left()
(
  sum(ydb_resources_cpu_limit_core_percents{database="$database"}) 
  <= bool 
  sum(ydb_resources_cpu_total_core_percents{database="$database"})
)
!= 0

panels.title: CPU utilization (dynnodes)

panels.description: Shows Elapsed µs vs CPU µs per node. If the ratio is > 100%, CPU time exceeds Elapsed time, which most likely indicates CPU overcommit.
panels.title: Elapsed Time vs CPU Time

panels.description: Displays the amount of RAM (Resident Set Size) consumed by each node.
panels.title: RSS size by node

panels.description: Shows overall usage and limit of the total size of database tables. Helps prevent storage space shortage issues.
panels.title: Storage usage

panels.description: Shows the number of shards experiencing high CPU load (from 50% to 100%). Helps assess the level of system overload.
panels.title: Overloaded shard count

panels.description: Displays the number of queries per second grouped by latency bins.
panels.title: Queries per second by latency buckets

panels.description: Displays the number of transactions per second grouped by latency bins.
panels.title: Transactions per second by latency buckets

panels.description: Displays the number of rows per second affected by corresponding operations.

targets.expr:
(sum(rate(tablets_DataShard_EngineHostRowReads{database="$database",container="ydb-dynamic"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + 
(sum (rate(tablets_DataShard_EngineHostRangeReadRows{database="$database",container="ydb-dynamic"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0))+ 
(sum (rate(followers_DataShard_EngineHostRowReads{database="$database",container="ydb-dynamic"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0))+ 
(sum (rate(followers_DataShard_EngineHostRangeReadRows{database="$database",container="ydb-dynamic"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0))

panels.title: Rows read, uploaded, updated, deleted

panels.description: Displays the number of active sessions per dynamic node. Helps identify uneven session distribution.
panels.title: Session count by dynnode

panels.description: Displays percentiles of query execution time.
panels.title: Query latency percentiles (ms)

panels.description: Displays percentiles of transaction execution time.
panels.title: Transaction latency percentiles (ms)

panels.description: Displays the number of errors occurred during YQL queries execution.
panels.title: YQL Issues per second

panels.description: Displays the number of gRPC response errors per second by type.
panels.title: GRPC response errors per second
